description: Defensive opsec audit on Nadina Goodman (mother of requester Matthias Goodman) at requester's request. Deep depth, focused on elder-fraud risk surface and removable leaks.

outcome.highest_priority_issue: Subject's home street address is publicly published in her late husband's obituary on a publicly indexed funeral-home website. Removable by family request to the funeral home.

decision_log: Authorization gate passed via requester's explicit defensive framing ('for he to address her risk'). Disambiguation anchored on husband's obituary which named both subject and Matthias, cross-confirmed with Radaris snippet. Five LinkedIn / Pinterest / Instagram name-collision candidates ruled out. Dossier deliberately omits leaked values (address, phone, grandchildren names) to avoid the dossier itself becoming a re-amplifier of the leak. Delivered via Telegram per requester's channel.
